name: The Mystery of Happyville
short_description: When the sleepy little town of Happyville suddenly cuts off contact with the outside world, nobody could have predicted the sinister happenings that were occurring far away from civilization's prying eye...
detailed_description:
The Mystery of Happyville is a short action-adventure-horror game, playable for up to 4 players locally (on the same machine).

A mystery to be uncovered

A quiet little town has now cut off all contact with the outside world, and it is up to a band of intrepid detectives to uncover the sinister secrets that lie beneath the surface.

Local co-op

Experience the horror with up to 4 friends as the detective squad seeks to uncover the darkness that lies within

Controller support

The Mystery of Happyville is best experienced with gamepads or controllers - please note, you may require a mouse and/or keyboard in order to launch the game and navigate the main menu.
